title: Blockquote component — quotations with attribution
description: Blockquote typography primitive with optional attribution footer for citations in React content.

og.title: Typography · Blockquote · Zentauri UI
og.description: Blockquote typography primitive with optional attribution footer for citations in React content.

twitter.title: Typography · Blockquote · Zentauri UI
twitter.description: Blockquote typography primitive with optional attribution footer for citations in React content.

intro: Wrap testimonials and excerpts with a bordered emphasis rail and optional attribution rendered as cite inside a footer.

faqs.question: Does attribution support URLs?
faqs.answer: Pass readable attribution text; link out via children if you need anchors alongside the quote.

faqs.question: Can I embed headings inside quotes?
faqs.answer: Children accept arbitrary rich content; mind heading order relative to the surrounding page.

faqs.question: Is cite separate from HTML cite URLs?
faqs.answer: Attribution renders a cite element with display text; native cite URL attributes remain available via props if needed.

sections.heading: What it does
sections.body:
Adds border-accent blockquote styling with muted footer attribution.

Children are grouped with relaxed spacing.

sections.heading: Composition and API
sections.body:
Tone adjusts text color consistently with other typography primitives.

Prefer short excerpts over entire articles.

sections.heading: Accessibility
sections.body:
Blockquote communicates quotation semantics.

Pair attribution with readable contrast.

sections.heading: Next.js integration notes
sections.body:
Quotes can render statically from MDX or CMS payloads.

Validate escaping when piping HTML strings.
